conversations.jarvis: Service? Kis service ki baat kar rahe hain, sir? Thoda aur detail denge?
Achha, matlab easy-peasy task hai. Toh batayein, sir, kya karwana hai? Main ready hoon!
JAR file? Uske saath kya karna hai, sir? Run karna hai ya kuch aur?
Sir, sirf "jar" se toh kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Kya JAR file execute karni hai, copy karni hai, ya uska naam batana hai?
Main? Main toh aapki service mein khada hoon, sir. Waiting for your next command, aur thoda sa power save kar raha hoon. 😉
Sir, abhi bhi 'jar' par hi atke hain. Kya aapko woh JAR file run karwani hai? Ya uski location check karni hai? Batayein na.
